item.title: Overturned Box Van
item.description: A box van overturns, creating a tough recovery challenge. How does Ron Pratt bring it back upright and under control?

media:content.media:title: Overturned Box Van
media:content.media:description: A box van overturns, creating a tough recovery challenge. How does Ron Pratt bring it back upright and under control?

item.title: Recovering a Damaged Truck and Trailer
item.description: A truck and trailer suffer heavy damage. What steps does Ron Pratt take to bring them back safely?

media:content.media:description: A truck and trailer suffer heavy damage. What steps does Ron Pratt take to bring them back safely?

item.title: Truck and Trailer Off Ramp
item.description: A truck and trailer slip off the ramp. How does Ron Pratt pull off this tricky recovery?

media:content.media:description: A truck and trailer slip off the ramp. How does Ron Pratt pull off this tricky recovery?

item.title: Jack-knifed Peterbilt recovery
item.description: A jack‑knifed Peterbilt blocks the way. What recovery tactics untangle this dangerous situation?

media:content.media:description: A jack‑knifed Peterbilt blocks the way. What recovery tactics untangle this dangerous situation?

item.title: Rotator vs. Material Handler
item.description: Two powerful machines take on a tough recovery scenario, each bringing different strengths to the job. Which one performs better under pressure?

media:content.media:description: Two powerful machines take on a tough recovery scenario, each bringing different strengths to the job. Which one performs better under pressure?

item.title: Heavy‑Duty Recovery on Unstable Ground
item.description: Unstable terrain makes recovery risky. How does Ron Pratt manage heavy‑duty work when the ground won’t cooperate?

item.title: Mini Excavator Rollover Rescue
item.description: A mini excavator tips over, creating a big challenge. How does Ron Pratt turn the rollover into a rescue?

item.title: Trash Truck Incident
item.description: A routine job turns complex as a trash truck requires a careful recovery. How do crews manage large service vehicles in tight situations?

item.title: Highway Chaos Ends in a Field
item.description: A roadside incident spirals into chaos. How does the recovery team bring order back to the highway?
